testimonials.name: Obaid Farooq
testimonials.text: Searching for places to eat in the local area and this place popped up. I do not normally leave reviews but I feel compelled as the food was absolutely exquisite. The Oreo Shake may be the best I have ever had. This place is elegant with an awesome vibe. I would love to come here again and again!

testimonials.name: Salman Malik
testimonials.text: I had a great time eating delicious food at your Oven Stories. The staff committed to great service and were very friendly. The atmosphere was awesome and I definitely liked the modern style. Most importantly, every food and drink on your menu tasted great.

testimonials.name: Furqan Mushtaq
testimonials.text: A 10/10 recommended place to visit with friends and family. The prices, quantity and taste are all in line. Ordered pizzas more than a couple of times and was never disappointed.

testimonials.name: Ashfaq Khan
testimonials.text: Absolutely loved this place, everything was pristine. The waiter was well mannered. The time I had at this place was worthwhile.

testimonials.name: Adnan Masood
testimonials.text: A must-visit place for foodies. Apart from quality and tasty food, there is love filled in every bite.
